code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut word = ""
    mut i = 0
    mut first = true
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          if not string.is_empty(word)
            if first
              result = "#{result}#{word}"
              first = false
            else
              result = "#{result} #{word}"
            end
            word = ""
          end
        else
          if string.is_empty(word) and b >= 97 and b <= 122
            let upper = b - 32
            word = "#{word}#{string.from_byte(upper)}"
          else
            word = "#{word}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not string.is_empty(word)
      if first
        result = "#{result}#{word}"
      else
        result = "#{result} #{word}"
      end
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
